perIssueResolution.blockingIssue: Bulk upsert swallowed bean-validation failures into generic FAILED rows instead of preserving field-level validation messages.
evidence: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/production/service/CatalogService.java:237-266 validates with BULK_VALIDATOR and formats field-level violations.

erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/production/service/CatalogServiceBulkUpsertTest.java:124 asserts blank/null required fields return messages containing brandId/name/unitOfMeasure/hsnCode/gstRate.

perIssueResolution.blockingIssue: Decomposition was superficial: focused services were pass-throughs and logic remained centralized in a 2119-line workflow class.
evidence: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/inventory/service/FinishedGoodsWorkflowService.java is reduced to facade (147 lines) but delegates to focused services.
erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/inventory/service/FinishedGoodsCatalogService.java:20,24,28,32,36 and peer focused services still forward directly to workflowService.

erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/inventory/service/FinishedGoodsWorkflowEngineService.java retains centralized business logic (e.g., listFinishedGoods line 101, createFinishedGood line 221, reserveForOrder line 298, confirmDispatch line 814) and is 2119 lines (wc -l evidence).

perIssueResolution.blockingIssue: Raw-material intake/opening-stock flows did not capture and persist manufacturing+expiry metadata.
evidence: erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/purchasing/service/PurchasingService.java:458-459 propagates manufacturingDate/expiryDate from GRN line into RawMaterialBatchRequest.

erp-domain/src/main/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/inventory/service/OpeningStockImportService.java:771 parses expiry_date and lines 445/489 persist expiryDate on raw-material and finished-good batches.

erp-domain/src/test/java/com/bigbrightpaints/erp/modules/purchasing/service/PurchasingServiceGoodsReceiptTest.java:324-396 verifies GRN propagation; OpeningStockPostingRegressionIT verifies imported manufacturedAt/expiryDate persistence.

perIssueResolution.blockingIssue: Frontend handoff documented incorrect dispatch reservation semantics and impossible PARTIAL_PACKED -> READY_TO_PACK transition.
evidence: .factory/library/frontend-handoff.md:1249 now states reservation occurs during sales order create/update and there is no standalone reserve endpoint.
.factory/library/frontend-handoff.md:1263 now states no public API transition moves PARTIAL_PACKED -> READY_TO_PACK.

blockingIssues.description: The fix does not resolve the decomposition blocker: business logic remains concentrated in a new 2119-line workflow engine instead of being migrated into catalog/stock/reservation/dispatch services; focused services are still delegators.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Data-contract bullets for RawMaterialBatchRequest and RawMaterialIntakeRequest were not updated to include newly added manufacturingDate/expiryDate fields, so frontend contract docs are partially stale for the expanded DTOs.

sharedStateObservations.observation: backend-worker decomposition guidance currently allows a pattern where a god service is replaced by a single engine/core class and focused services remain pass-through wrappers, which conflicts with mission decomposition intent.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Skill step text in .factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md allows 'keep it as a facade initially if needed'; in this fix, FinishedGoodsWorkflowService became a 147-line facade while FinishedGoodsWorkflowEngineService is 2119 lines and focused services delegate to it.

testsInspected: Handoff verification record shows targeted tests: CatalogServiceBulkUpsertTest, PurchasingServiceGoodsReceiptTest, TS_InventoryDispatchStateRuntimeCoverageTest (exit 0).
Handoff verification record shows gate-fast suite: mvn test -Pgate-fast -Djacoco.skip=true (378 tests, 0 failures).
commandsInspected: jq feature lookup in mission features.json
jq -s transcript extraction for workerSessionId ee153482-6ca5-4f83-b02d-f4e0179bb3df

summary: Fix review result: fail. Three of four prior blocking findings are resolved (bulk per-item validation messaging, raw-material manufacturing/expiry metadata capture, and frontend dispatch/production flow corrections), but the finished-goods decomposition blocker remains unresolved because logic is still centralized in a 2119-line workflow engine with focused services acting as wrappers.
